creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Adam –

Since the lang/go* updates also contain security fixes, I think we should do the cherry-pick of 0505b712df3ae2b4bcaba00aecc7c1e9100d8609 to the 2023Q4, but apparently this doesn't cleanly apply to 2023Q4 branch (around ~140 merge conflicts).

Should I just bump PORTREVISION similar to what is done in main branch, instead of cherry-picking, so that lang/go* consumers get the security fixes, or there is a better option ?

Thanks!
